problem: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified
mechanism: Photodynamic therapy targeting specific cell receptors
hypothesis: The key to What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified is Photodynamic therapy targeting specific cell receptors — specifically Photodynamic therapy targeting — which would help 17,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
